title: Floral Sugar Crisp Dates
description: A raw-friendly date-night korean dish featuring floral notes and a crunchy texture made with dark brown sugar.
instructions: Soften the dates in a small bowl with a little warm water until they are pliable.
Spread the softened dates out on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a separate small bowl, mix together dark brown sugar and coconut oil to form a crumbly mixture.
Sprinkle the dark brown sugar and coconut oil mixture evenly over the dates.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
